title: Metals gain as LME places restrictions on Russian zinc and aluminium
section_path: Metals gain as LME places restrictions on Russian zinc and aluminium
section_path_text: Metals gain as LME places restrictions on Russian zinc and aluminium
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Supply side issues dominated sentiment. The spectre of further disruptions saw metals and energy rise. This offset the headwinds from hawkish central banks that helped push the USD higher.
